christensen.mechanism: Turnkey systems integration of containerized Li-ion BESS, bidirectional PCS, MV grid coupling, and EMS dispatch, delivered under single-source EPC contract with VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification

christensen.outcome: as a turnkey capital asset with single-source responsibility from site study to commissioning

technology.class: Large-Scale Battery Energy Storage System EPC
technology.underlyingMechanism: Turnkey systems integration of containerized Li-ion BESS, bidirectional PCS, MV grid coupling, and EMS dispatch, delivered under single-source EPC contract with VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification
technology.customProductGroup: Battery Energy Storage System EPC Services

functionalPromise.statement: Deliver grid-compliant, dispatchable multi-MWh electrical energy storage as a turnkey capital asset with single-source responsibility from site study to commissioning
functionalPromise.object: grid-compliant, dispatchable multi-MWh electrical energy storage
functionalPromise.context: as a turnkey capital asset with single-source responsibility from site study to commissioning

commodityFunctionalPromise: Deliver operational grid-connected electrical energy storage assets as turnkey capital projects with single-source engineering, procurement, construction, and grid-code certification
differentiators: Single-point EPC accountability vs. split-contract approach
Integrated PV+BESS design authority from incumbent PV-EPC practice
Native VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification path
Proven industrial scale (4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference)

features.name: Containerized Li-ion BESS Integration
features.short: Integrate LFP battery modules, BMS, HVAC, and fire suppression inside ISO container envelope
features.longDescription: 20ft/40ft ISO high-cube containers pre-fitted with Grade-A LFP battery racks, BMS/BAMS/BCMS stack, liquid-cooling loop, HVAC, and NOVEC 1230 suppression. IP54 envelope. Requires craned foundation placement and internal commissioning wiring.

features.name: Bidirectional Power Conversion System
features.short: Convert between DC battery and AC grid via 4-quadrant inverter with reactive power capability
features.longDescription: String or central PCS rated to full BESS MW capacity, operating in all four PQ quadrants. Enables peak shaving, arbitrage, and Q(U) / cos-phi support. Efficiency typ. 97–98%; controls response under 100 ms for FCR-grade dispatch.

features.name: Medium-Voltage Grid Coupling
features.short: Connect storage asset to 10/20 kV DSO grid via MV transformer, switchgear, and protection relays
features.longDescription: MV step-up transformer, SF6-free RMU switchgear, digital protection relays, metering, and NA-protection. Designed to VDE-AR-N 4110. Includes DSO-interface cabinet, remote trip, and SCADA uplink.

features.name: Energy Management System (EMS)
features.short: Dispatch charge/discharge against peak shaving, arbitrage, or ancillary-service objectives
features.longDescription: Software layer receiving setpoints from market, load, and grid signals; solving optimization to issue PCS commands. Supports forecasting, SoC management, and degradation-aware cycling. API to aggregators/VPPs.

features.name: Grid-Code Certification Delivery
features.short: Produce VDE-AR-N 4110 plant certificate (type B) per FGW TR8 with DSO acceptance
features.longDescription: Certification dossier prepared and submitted by EPC; includes FGW TR3 unit cert handover, TR8 plant cert, commissioning test protocols, and DSO acceptance inspection. Governs when the asset is allowed to energize.

features.name: Co-located PV+BESS Hybrid Design
features.short: Mein Solar carries PV EPC authority into BESS design, sizing PV array and BESS as one coupled asset
features.longDescription: Joint sizing of PV generator and BESS for self-consumption, curtailment recovery, or solar shifting. Single grid-connection point, shared EMS, shared MV switchgear — lower BoS cost and one grid-code certification vs. separate assets.

features.name: EV-Charging Buffer Configuration
features.short: Size BESS as buffer for HPC stations to avoid costly grid upgrade at site with weak connection
features.longDescription: BESS sized to supply peak HPC power (150–350 kW per dispenser) while drawing smoothed average from the grid. Enables HPC deployment on sites where DSO upgrade is economically or temporally blocked.

features.name: Civil Works & Site Preparation
features.short: Foundation, container placement, cable trenching, fencing, and access provisioning
features.longDescription: Reinforced concrete pads sized to container load + seismic, cable trenches to MV cabinet, perimeter fencing, fire-service access, and lightning protection. Coordinated with local building permit (Baugenehmigung).

features.name: Single-Source EPC Contract Vehicle
features.short: One contract, one schedule, one warranty wrapper covering battery, PCS, grid, software, civil
features.longDescription: Mein Solar acts as single legal counterparty for the whole asset. Performance guarantee (kWh throughput, roundtrip efficiency, availability) wrapped across multi-vendor equipment. Lifts interface-risk burden from the asset owner.

constraints.name: MV Grid Connection Capacity
constraints.description: DSO must have spare MV feeder capacity; where grid is saturated (common in rural DE), a grid upgrade is required and may be denied or cost-prohibitive

constraints.name: Land Footprint and Siting
constraints.description: Container footprint plus safety clearances and fire-service access; approx. 40–80 m²/MWh; municipal Baugenehmigung required

constraints.name: Fire-Protection Clearance
constraints.description: Minimum distance to buildings and property line, hydrant access, separation walls for >3 MWh clusters per VdS and local Feuerwehr guidance

constraints.name: Li-Ion Thermal Runaway Hazard
constraints.description: Inherent chemistry risk; cannot be eliminated — only contained via NOVEC/aerosol suppression, compartmentalization, and deflagration venting

constraints.name: Grid Code Certification Lead Time
constraints.description: FGW TR8 type B plant certificate and DSO acceptance lengthen the schedule by 6–12 months; parallelizable with procurement but always on the critical path

constraints.name: Battery Supply Chain Concentration
constraints.description: LFP cells concentrated in Chinese suppliers; FX, tariff, and CRMA/EU Battery Regulation compliance exposure

constraints.name: Ambient Temperature Envelope
constraints.description: HVAC maintains internal setpoint; operation at extremes reduces roundtrip efficiency and cycle life

constraints.name: Round-Trip Energy Losses
constraints.description: Thermodynamic floor from PCS switching losses, battery internal resistance, and auxiliary HVAC load

constraints.name: CAPEX Viability Threshold
constraints.description: Below ~€250–400/kWh installed the arbitrage/peak-shaving business case closes; above, payback exceeds 7 years and investors walk
